# Decision Record — [Short Title]

> Copy this template for each decision. Save the file as `docs/decisions/YYYY-MM-DD-short-title.md` and add an entry to [docs/decision-log.md](../decision-log.md).

---

## Metadata

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| **Date** | YYYY-MM-DD |
| **Status** | Proposed / Accepted / Superseded / Deprecated |
| **Deciders** | [Names or roles of people who made the decision] |
| **Owner** | [Single person responsible for this record] |
| **Linked issue / PR** | [#issue or PR URL] |

---

## Context

*What is the problem or situation that requires a decision? Include any constraints, background, or forces at play.*

---

## Decision

*State the decision clearly and concisely. Start with "We will…" or "We have decided to…"*

---

## Options Considered

| Option | Pros | Cons |
|---|---|---|
| Option A | … | … |
| Option B | … | … |
| Option C (chosen) | … | … |

---

## Consequences

*What are the expected outcomes, trade-offs, or follow-on actions as a result of this decision?*

- **Positive:** …
- **Negative / trade-offs:** …
- **Follow-on actions:** …

---

## References

- [Link to relevant design doc, ADR, RFC, or issue]

---

*See all decisions in the [Decision Log](../decision-log.md).*
